name: Homemade Easter Eggs (2 Varieties)
recipeInstructions:
- Peanut Butter Eggs: Mix together all ingredients. Form into small eggs. Refrigerate for about 1/2 hour on a wax paper-covered cookie sheet. Dip in hot Chocolate Coating, using a fork.
- Butter Cream Eggs: Cream together cream cheese, butter and vanilla. Knead in sugar and form into eggs. Refrigerate for a short time on wax paper-covered cookie sheet. Dip into hot Chocolate Coating, using a fork.
- Chocolate Coating: Melt ingredients in a double boiler. Keep over low heat until the center is melted. Candies can be kept at room temperature for 4-5 days.
